nodes.label: AI as task expediter for tedious work
nodes.grounding_span: We are asking AI to expedite more tedious tasks

nodes.label: AI reliability and trustworthiness
nodes.grounding_span: it is not fail safe and often misses emails

nodes.label: AI as autonomous agent for routine tasks
nodes.grounding_span: ideally we would get it to the place where you can handle tasks on its own

nodes.label: AI as creative collaborator in film production
nodes.label_negative: AI as limited to simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: we are using AI for video generation for a large budget, mainstream film

nodes.label: AI impact on career pipeline and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that if we don't need coordinators anymore, how we will ever get a producer

nodes.label: Trust and reliability in task execution
nodes.grounding_span: we just can't trust it right now

nodes.label: Creative excellence and cinematic quality
nodes.grounding_span: how much can the director art direct the framing, composition

nodes.label: Career progression and fair opportunity
nodes.grounding_span: how we will ever get a producer? There's no entry level position to train upwards

nodes.label: Frustration with AI training difficulty
nodes.grounding_span: It's really frustrating to try and generate a simple response

nodes.label: Optimism about AI iteration speed
nodes.grounding_span: Everyone is thrilled about the iteration turnaround time

nodes.label: Concern about job displacement and career pipeline
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about how people will be replaced

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: it's better to try and refine the original prompt

nodes.label: Systematic testing of AI capabilities
nodes.grounding_span: We are testing how much of this beat in the script needs to be shot vs can be done completely in AI
